'''horasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulcanic|vulcanic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulcanic|vulcanic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| horasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:horasithi|horasithi]] || [[word:horasiji|horasiji]] || [[word:horasishi|horasishi]] || [[word:horasiki|horasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:horasuthuthu|horasuthuthu]] || [[word:horasujuju|horasujuju]] || [[word:horasushushu|horasushushu]] || [[word:horasukuku|horasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:horasuthu|horasuthu]] || [[word:horasuju|horasuju]] || [[word:horasushu|horasushu]] || [[word:horasuku|horasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:horasufthuf|horasufthuf]] || [[word:horasufjuf|horasufjuf]] || [[word:horasufshuf|horasufshuf]] || [[word:horasufkuf|horasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:horasethe|horasethe]] || [[word:horaseje|horaseje]] || [[word:horaseshe|horaseshe]] || [[word:horaseke|horaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:horasothotho|horasothotho]] || [[word:horasojojo|horasojojo]] || [[word:horasoshosho|horasoshosho]] || [[word:horasokoko|horasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:horasotho|horasotho]] || [[word:horasojo|horasojo]] || [[word:horasosho|horasosho]] || [[word:horasoko|horasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:horasofthof|horasofthof]] || [[word:horasofjof|horasofjof]] || [[word:horasofshof|horasofshof]] || [[word:horasofkof|horasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:horasÃŸfthÃŸf|horasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfjÃŸf|horasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfshÃŸf|horasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfkÃŸf|horasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:horasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|horasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|horasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|horasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|horasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:horasÃŸfthÃŸf|horasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfjÃŸf|horasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfshÃŸf|horasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfkÃŸf|horasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:horasÃŸfthÃŸf|horasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfjÃŸf|horasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfshÃŸf|horasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:horasÃŸfkÃŸf|horasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:horasÃḊthÃḊ|horasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:horasÃḊjÃḊ|horasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:horasÃḊshÃḊ|horasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:horasÃḊkÃḊ|horasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:horasathatha|horasathatha]] || [[word:horasajaja|horasajaja]] || [[word:horasashasha|horasashasha]] || [[word:horasakaka|horasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:horasatha|horasatha]] || [[word:horasaja|horasaja]] || [[word:horasasha|horasasha]] || [[word:horasaka|horasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:horasafthaf|horasafthaf]] || [[word:horasafjaf|horasafjaf]] || [[word:horasafshaf|horasafshaf]] || [[word:horasafkaf|horasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:horasasha|horasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:horashÃḋsha|horashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:horasrosha|horasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:horasmusha|horasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:horasyasha|horasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohorasnkshÃḋsha|gohorasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohorasnkrosha|gohorasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohorasnkmusha|gohorasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohorasnkyasha|gohorasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:horarasasha|horarasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:horarashÃḋsha|horarashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:horarasrosha|horarasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:horarasmusha|horarasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:horarasyasha|horarasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohorarasnkshÃḋsha|gohorarasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohorarasnkrosha|gohorarasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohorarasnkmusha|gohorarasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohorarasnkyasha|gohorarasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:herÃḊsasha|herÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:herÃḊshÃḋsha|herÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:herÃḊsrosha|herÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:herÃḊsmusha|herÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:herÃḊsyasha|herÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goherÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|goherÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goherÃḊsnkrosha|goherÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goherÃḊsnkmusha|goherÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goherÃḊsnkyasha|goherÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:horfasasha|horfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:horfashÃḋsha|horfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:horfasrosha|horfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:horfasmusha|horfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:horfasyasha|horfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohorfasnkshÃḋsha|gohorfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohorfasnkrosha|gohorfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohorfasnkmusha|gohorfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohorfasnkyasha|gohorfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
